title: Uranium Radiation Mod
body:
**IF YOU ARE A LOW-END PC USER DO NOT USE THE NUCLEAR BOMB. THIS IS A WARNING.**

This is the Uranium Radiation Mod!

Here are the key features.
- Adds Uranium as an ore that generates.
- New tools and armor such as the Uranium Armor and Uranium Pickaxe.
- Uranium is toxic, so don't hold it.

If you want a bit more radiation to your Minecraft world install this mod!
